triage_rows.detail: seed actions now execute in trigger-minute order rather than tier-name order
the branch should first finish deterministic/attribution understanding on canonical seeds before widening phase 2
seed simulator plus attribution does not authorize opening an intraday replay lane

interpretation: V1.34F turns the corrected seed simulator plus attribution into the next phase-2 direction triage.
The result is constructive but still narrow: canonical seed understanding improves, while broader expansion and replay binding remain blocked.
